browser.title: Document Browser
browser.notConfiguredMessage: To use the document browser, configure your Paperless-ngx integration by setting the PAPERLESS_URL and PAPERLESS_API_TOKEN environment variables and restarting Cornerstone.
browser.unreachableMessage: Unable to connect to your Paperless-ngx instance. Please check your configuration and ensure Paperless-ngx is running.
browser.noAdditionalDocuments: No additional documents available to link.

linkedDocuments.title: Documents
linkedDocuments.configureMessage: Set PAPERLESS_URL and PAPERLESS_API_TOKEN environment variables and restart Cornerstone to enable document linking.
linkedDocuments.failedToLink: Failed to link document. Please try again.
linkedDocuments.failedToUnlink: Failed to unlink document. Please try again.
linkedDocuments.duplicateLink: This document is already linked to {{entity}}.
linkedDocuments.selectDocumentSubtitle: Select a document from Paperless-ngx to link to {{entity}}.
linkedDocuments.unlinkConfirmation: "{{title}}" will be removed from {{entity}}. The document will remain in Paperless-ngx.
linkedDocuments.workItemEmpty: Link receipts, contracts, and plans from Paperless-ngx to keep everything in one place.
linkedDocuments.householdItemEmpty: Link receipts, warranties, and manuals from Paperless-ngx to keep everything in one place.
linkedDocuments.invoiceEmpty: Link invoice PDFs, receipts, and related documents from Paperless-ngx to keep everything in one place.
